_meta.note: Course LIST sourced from DiscGolfScene (public). Per-hole par/distance is NOT published as structured data on any free source (it lives in UDisc/DGCR/official park scorecards). hole_pars/hole_lengths are null until filled from an official course scorecard or crowdsourced in-app on first play.

courses.name: Mott Park DGC

courses.name: Kensington Metropark
courses.hole_data_source: Main layout - per-hole not pulled (Toboggan layout is a separate entry).

courses.name: Holly Woods
courses.hole_data_source: Infinite Courses + UDisc (main layout 18 holes, par 54). Per-hole par derived: par total 54 ÷ 18 = all par 3. Per-hole distances not published free.
